title: Klarna launches tickets for a week of experiential retail in London’s Covent Garden
full_text:
Would you like to strut like a supermodel, flex like a yogi or rock the hottest trends this summer – well look no further and step into the smooothest shop in the West End.

Today global payments provider Klarna announced the launch of tickets for an immersive fun-filled week of activities in the retail store of dreams. Set in the heart of Covent Garden, with over 20 of Klarna’s retail partners and customer favourites, the week promises something for everyone.

As well as daily ‘themed’ events like ‘Transformation Thursday’, ‘Wellness Wednesday’ and ‘Styling Saturday’, there are also FREE but exclusive ticket-only sessions which guests can book in advance on our website here. These include a styling session hosted by Fashion Director Arabella Greenhill; a meet-and-greet with star fitness guru Sophie Aris; and a Get Running workshop with inspiring performance and wellness guru Chevy Rough. 

Free to attend non-ticketed events include a home interiors masterclass with designer Charlotte Jade, daily manicures and complimentary coffees, protein shakes and hundreds of prizes being given away by some of Klarna’s 3,500 UK retailers throughout the week, the store experience is a must attend event. 

Luke Griffiths, General Manager of Klarna UK commented “We have been astounded by such an amazing response since announcing our first ever UK Pop-up and the doors have yet to even open. Every ticket to our Styling Saturday with ASOS was snapped up in less than 30 minutes. Shopping should be a joy and together with our fantastic retail partners, our aim is to create inspiring and engaging experiences for consumers. Come down and learn how to ‘Klarna ‘it”.

For a full schedule of the weeks events (5-12th of June), and to find out how you can book onto some of the exclusive ticket-only sessions, visit: https://www.klarna.com/uk/pop-up/

 

The Klarna Pop-up will be open to the public from 5 – 12 June at

9-11 Shorts Gardens, Covent Garden, WC2H 9AT

For more information, please visit: https://www.klarna.com/uk/pop-up/

 

www.klarna.com

@klarnauk #klarnait

About Klarna

Klarna is a leading global leading payments provider and fully-licensed bank, which wants to revolutionise the payment experience for shoppers and merchants alike. Founded in Stockholm, Sweden, in 2005, Klarna gives consumers the option to pay now, pay later or over time — offering a trusted, frictionless and smoooth checkout experience.

Klarna now works with 130,000 merchants including Adidas, Sephora ASOS, Nike, Sonos, IKEA, H&M and JD Sports, to offer payment solutions to users across Europe and North America. Klarna has 2,500 employees and is active in 14 countries.
